name: Input Ports and Port Trajectories
description: Definition of the set of input ports IPZ of a system Z and the input port trajectories generated by complete input trajectories.

elements.text: The set of input ports of the system Z is denoted IPZ: {I1Z, ..., InZ} if IZ is a product, or {IZ} otherwise.
If #IPZ > 1, f ∈ ITZ, and j ∈ IJS[1, #IPZ], then PJN(IjZ) ∘ f is the IjZ input port trajectory generated by f.
